question_text: Let (𝑋, 𝑌) have joint probability mass function 𝑝(𝑥, 𝑦) = { 𝑒−2 𝑥! (𝑦−𝑥)! 𝑖𝑓 𝑥= 0, 1, 2, … , 𝑦; 𝑦= 0, 1, 2, … 0 𝑜𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟𝑤𝑖𝑠𝑒. Then which of the following statements is/are true?

options.B: The moment generating function of 𝑌 is 𝑒2(𝑒𝑣−1) for all 𝑣∈ℝ
options.D: The joint moment generating function of (𝑋, 𝑌) is 𝑒−2+(1+𝑒𝑢)𝑒𝑣 for all (𝑢, 𝑣) ∈ℝ2
